productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Double Handle Shimmer Handbags
description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this handbag from spice art is crafted from the finest material and in fashionable designs to give you that stylish edge. Made of synthetic leather with shimmery print One main zippered compartment with a mobile pouch and organiser pouch One zippered pouch at the back Broad synthetic leather handles with metallic lining at the holes Synthetic leather flowerlet with crystal embellishments on the front Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
